title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
